data.narrative: Thomas is a 42-year-old male working as a technician or associate professional. They have bachelor level education and poor health. They live as: couple with children. They own a car and a bike.

encounters.activity_description: Working at the office or job site
encounters.contact_narrative: Marie is a 30-year-old female working as a manager. They have bachelor level education and good health. They live as: couple without children. They rely on public transport or walking.
Marie is a 30-year-old female working as a manager. They have bachelor level education and good health. They live as: couple without children. They rely on public transport or walking.
